name: Nazareth
oracleText:
Nazareth, Home of Quiet Years enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {W}.
{1}{W}, {T}: Scry 1. Activate only if you control a legendary creature.
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses David Roberts's "Shrine of the Annunciation, Nazareth" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Home of Quiet Years

classics.license: Public domain; Library of Congress lithograph on Wikimedia Commons.
classics.creditText: David Roberts, Shrine of the Annunciation, Nazareth
classics.sourceNotes: A nineteenth-century Nazareth lithograph gives the location card a strong classics treatment.
